data.title: Avadel Pharmaceuticals shareholders approved acquisition by Alkermes. Transaction valued at $100 million.
data.description: This information is restricted from being released, published, or distributed either fully or partially in any jurisdiction where doing so would breach the laws or regulations in place in that jurisdiction.

data.title: Devon Energy to report Q4 2025 earnings on Feb 17 after US market closes, on their website.
data.description: Devon Energy Corp. (NYSE: DVN) revealed plans to unveil its financial results for the fourth quarter of 2025 on February 17, 2026, after the closure of U.S. financial markets. Interested parties can access the earnings release and presentation on the company's official website, www.devonenergy.com.

data.title: Crinetics Pharmaceuticals grants 37,575 stock options and 25,525 RSUs to 10 new employees in Jan 2026.
data.description: On January 10, 2026, Crinetics Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (Nasdaq: CRNX) disclosed that it awarded non-executive employees with 37,575 stock options to buy its common stock and 25,525 restricted stock unit (“RSU”) awards under the 2021 Employment Inducement Incentive Award Plan. These awards were granted as inducements for new employees joining the company, following Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4).

data.title: Nasdaq reports 15,183,396,236 shares in short interest for 3,498 stocks by Dec 31, 2025, down from 15,012,659,234 shares on Dec 15, 2025.
data.description: In New York on January 12, 2026, it was reported that as of the settlement date on December 31, 2025, the short interest in 3,498 Nasdaq Global Market SM securities had reached 15,183,396,236 shares. This figure marks an increase from the previous settlement date of December 15, 2025, where short interest in 3,486 Global Market issues totaled 15,012,659,234 shares. The short interest for December translated to 2.83 days, showing a slight decrease from the previous reporting period which stood at 2.90 days.

data.title: BCP Investment Corp to release Q4 and full year 2025 earnings with call on March 6, 2026, 10 am ET.
data.description: A conference call is set to take place at 10:00 am Eastern Time on Friday, March 6, 2026.

data.title: DISH Wireless fails to pay Crown Castle, owes over $3.5 billion as contract terminated.
data.description: Crown Castle has opted to terminate its contract with DISH, putting the latter in a position where it is required to pay Crown over $3.5 billion as part of this agreement.

data.title: Wealthfront's fiscal Q3 2026: Record revenue $93.2M, net income $30.9M, platform assets $92.8B, EBITDA $43.8M.
data.description: The company experienced a significant boost in revenue, reaching a new high of $93.2 million, reflecting a 16% increase. Net income also saw a substantial rise, reaching $30.9 million, resulting in a net income margin of 33%. The total platform assets reached a record $92.8 billion, marking a substantial 21% increase. Adjusted EBITDA saw a notable growth of 24%, amounting to $43.8 million, with an Adjusted EBITDA margin of 47%.

data.title: Kenneth G. St. Romain retires as Senior VP at Pool Corporation, John B. Watwood appointed as Executive VP.
data.description: In Covington, Louisiana, on January 12, 2026, Pool Corporation revealed that Kenneth “Kenny” G. St. Romain, the Senior Vice President, is set to retire from his role later this year. Concurrently, John B. Watwood has been welcomed as the new Executive Vice President of the company. Mr. Watwood will be in charge of the North American swimming pool operations and will also supervise digital and technology projects. Reporting to Peter D. Arvan, the President and CEO of Pool Corporation, Mr. St. Romain will aid in the transition until his departure. Pool Corporation is listed on Nasdaq/GSM with the ticker symbol POOL.
SuRo Capital Corp. announces its latest investment portfolio update for Q4 and FY2025.

data.title: Wayfair and Google collaborate on Universal Commerce Protocol (UCP) to improve AI shopping experience for home products.
data.description: Wayfair Inc., a leading home goods retailer traded on the NYSE under the symbol W, has collaborated with Google to create the Universal Commerce Protocol (UCP). This open standard aims to enhance the interaction between AI agents and is set to revolutionize the way shopping is done. The partnership between Wayfair and Google signifies a pivotal moment in advancing technology in the retail industry.

data.title: Assaí to deregister from U.S.; to file Form 15F, ending registration of shares & ADSs under SEC Act of 1934.
data.description: In a recent announcement, São Paulo-based Sendas Distribuidora S.A. (B3: ASAI3), also known as Assaí, revealed its plan to submit a Form 15F to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission ("SEC"). This move signifies the company's intention to cease the registration of its common shares and American Depositary Shares ("ADSs") under US securities laws.

data.title: Health In Tech reveals hitDavos 2026 agenda with global leaders in politics, AI, and culture. Jan 12, 2026, Stuart, Fla. NASDAQ: HIT.
data.description: In Stuart, Florida on January 12, 2026, Health In Tech, Inc. revealed the details of hitDavos 2026, a significant event for the company. The summit, focused on InsurTech and leadership, will feature a comprehensive agenda and program schedule. Health In Tech, a company utilizing artificial intelligence in its InsurTech platform, operates under the Nasdaq symbol HIT. This event is set to gather industry leaders and professionals to discuss crucial topics in the field.

data.title: Ziegler secures $162,860,000 financing for Presbyterian Living - The Moorings (IL). Bond issued through Illinois Finance Authority.
data.description: Ziegler, a specialty investment bank, recently completed the successful closure of The Moorings of Arlington Heights' 2025 Bonds, totaling $162,860,000. The bonds were issued through the Illinois Finance Authority.

data.title: Regal Rexnord Corp. (NYSE: RRX) will release Q4 2025 financial results on Feb 4, 2026 & host conference call on Feb 5, 2026.
data.description: Regal Rexnord Corporation (NYSE: RRX) has shared its intention to unveil the financial results for the fourth quarter of 2025 after the market closes on Wednesday, February 4, 2026. Following this announcement, a conference call is scheduled by Regal Rexnord for discussing the earnings.

data.title: SciSparc Ltd. notified by Nasdaq for failing to meet minimum stockholders' equity requirement. As of June 30, 2025, reported stockholders' equity was approximately $(81,000).
data.description: Tel Aviv-based company SciSparc Ltd. (Nasdaq: SPRC) announced the receipt of a Notification Letter from Nasdaq stating that it is not meeting the minimum stockholders’ equity requirement for Nasdaq Capital Market listing. The company reported stockholders’ equity of approximately $(81,000) as of June 30, 2025, falling short of the required minimum of $2,500,000. This puts SciSparc at risk of losing its Nasdaq listing under Rule 5550(b)(1). The company, focused on clinical-stage pharmaceutical developments through subsidiary NeuroThera Labs Inc., will need to take action to rectify the situation to maintain its listing status.

data.title: Destination XL Group reported holiday sales results for 9-week period ending January 3, 2026.
data.description: On January 12, 2026, in Canton, Massachusetts, Destination XL Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: DXLG), a prominent specialty retailer for Big + Tall men's clothing and footwear, disclosed their results for the 9-week holiday sales period concluding on January 3, 2026 (unaudited).

data.title: A4A launches "Red, Flight & Blue" campaign to celebrate America's 250th birthday on July 4th, using social media and videos.
data.description: A new campaign titled "Red, Flight & Blue—Celebrating America 250" has been launched by Airlines for America (A4A) in anticipation of the nation's 250th birthday on July 4th, 2026. The initiative will leverage social media, blog content, videos, and earned media to commemorate the occasion.
